about.title: درباره
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype برای reference و training. بدونt برای clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support و advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, یا determine ونتیلاتور تنظیمات.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against بیمار, your مرکز workflow, و local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: ضروری before continuing به clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device و will be همگام‌سازی شد when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: بازبینی safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data و uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible برای بیمار care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in مرکز context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active مرکز و نقش shown by your session. Keep records within correct مرکز workflow و follow local escalation, بازبینی, و approval procedures.

inputs.title: وارد کنید:ing inputs
inputs.body: Use پذیرش به وارد کنید: available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). اختیاری ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing اختیاری data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a ذخیره blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations نمایش advisory ونتیلاتور setting references با a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align با your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only و verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: پایش و alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a توصیه, use پایش به log vitals و labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds و should be assessed according به local protocol.

offline.title: آفلاین behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (پذیرش, advisory summaries, پایش) works آفلاین. Data is saved locally. اختیاری AI features require connectivity. When بازگشت آنلاین, ادامه as طبیعی.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume و oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory به expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: حجم جاری (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, و pH, tied به a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance و verification state برای a reference range. Only active approved یا verified ranges are eligible برای active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need بازبینی before dataset یا training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue برای بازبینی decisions, corrections, exclusions, و audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current آفلاین, آنلاین, یا syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden از طبیعی clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; وارد کنید: SpO₂ و سایر vitals when available. برای better matching, افزودن PaO₂, PaCO₂, و pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app آفلاین
offline.body: پذیرش, advisory summaries, و پایش work آفلاین. Data is stored locally. اختیاری AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not ضروری برای core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, در انتظار, retired, rejected, و unverified ranges are not eligible برای active decision-support display. بازبینی source, version, scope, و verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness راهنما is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness و shadow-mode details are visible only به approved governance roles. بدونrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs بازبینی
needsReview.body: Use بازبینی queue به check submitted data, request correction, تأیید eligible records, یا حذف از فهرست records با an audit دلیل.

guides.home: بازبینی مرکز context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, و records needing بازبینی before opening a بیمار workflow.
guides.admit: Capture بیمار pathway و available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly و بازبینی backend-confirmed calculations after ذخیره.
guides.tracking: Use پیگیری به scan recent ventilation status و بازبینی needs. Read trend flags با source data و local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture برای de-identified candidate records. Human بازبینی is ضروری before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use بازبینی queue به تأیید, request correction, یا حذف از فهرست records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards برای aggregate quality, بازبینی, reference, و governance status. Avoid بیمار identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use تنظیمات برای حساب, مرکز, accessibility, حریم خصوصی, sync, و reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: بازبینی FiO₂ و PEEP; consider recruitment; check برای shunt یا V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: بازبینی minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation و perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols و clinical judgment.
